caption: A person wearing a white patterned button-down shirt is seated at a desk, interacting with an open book. The book features pink pages and a section with a grid of illustrated panels and a photograph of a group of people. In the initial sequence, the person’s hand is visible near the top of the page, and they appear to be reading or reviewing the content. As the sequence progresses, the person's hand moves to the bottom of the page, turning or adjusting the book. The final shot pulls back to reveal the person's upper body as they look down at the book, resting their hands on the pages. A small, metallic device and other books are visible on the desk surface. The background consists of a brick wall and a window, suggesting an indoor office or study setting.
